stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible on top of box_2, and both end_effector_left and end_effector_right are free.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped with both end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is stacked on top of the green box (box_2), and both left and right end-effectors are not holding anything.

post_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is not grasped by both end_effector_left and end_effector_right; no two end-effectors are visibly holding it simultaneously.

stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible and end_effector_left and end_effector_right are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped by end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: box_1 (red) is in contact/blocked by the robot arms, so it is not clearly accessible, and both end effectors appear not to be grasping any object.

stages.precondition: box_1 is accessible to both end_effector_left and end_effector_right, and both end-effectors are grasping nothing.
stages.postcondition: box_1 is grasped with dual-arm symmetric contact by end_effector_left and end_effector_right.

pre_validation.reason: The red box (box_1) is on the table within reach of both the left and right end-effectors, and neither end-effector is shown holding any object.

post_validation.reason: The red box_1 is only contacted on one side by an end-effector; the other end-effector is not in symmetric dual-arm grasp contact with it.

cycles.outcome: cycle_error: Maximum number of replans exceeded (2).
